title: Departmental minute on public dividend capital write-off: 2024 to 2025
body: "This minute was presented to Parliament on 12 May 2025. It sets out details of the public dividend capital to be cancelled or transferred following the dissolution of:   Yeovil District Hospital NHS Foundation Trust (acquired by Somerset NHS Foundation Trust) Southport and Ormskirk Hospital NHS Trust (acquired by Mersey and West Lancashire Teaching Hospitals NHS Trust)  "
